evidence.title: Genesy secures €5 million in landmark funding to further B2B sales ...
evidence.snippet: # Genesy secures €5 million in landmark funding to further B2B sales with AI-powered agents | EU-Startups. # Genesy secures €5 million in landmark funding to further B2B sales with AI-powered agents. **Genesy**, the Barcelona-based AI-driven startup dedicated to reshaping B2B sales processes, has successfully raised €5 million in a seed funding round in order to grow its team and scale in key markets. ### New €70 million GVC Gaesco fund targets InfraTech startups focused on energy, industry and digital infrastructure. ### YC-backed Escape raises €15.4 million Series A led by Balderton for its AI offensive security engineering platform. ### Exclusive: German startup happyhotel raises €6.5 million to build AI agents for hotel revenue management. ### Preply adds €127 million and nearly triples valuation as it scales AI and tutoring platform globally. ### YC-backed UK startup Elyos AI raises €11.1 million to build AI agents for trades and field services. ### French startup Cleavr raises €1 million to automate accounts receivable workflows with AI.

evidence.snippet: AI-Native Sales Platform for B2B | Enginy (formerly Genesy). Start by chatting with AI, or let it recommend who to reach out to using real market signals and your company context. Combine waterfall enrichment across 30+ data sources with AI research to get verified contacts and rich profile and company context. person.role_title: was summarized by AI from the post below. M.J Zachariah WINDOW ON AMERICA, ZARIA • 47 followers 1mo Report this post In 2023, we marveled at AI that could draft an email. By 2026, AI won't just write the message; it will evaluate the vendor, negotiate the contract, sign it, and update your ledger autonomously. Welcome to the 'Year of the Agent.' As someone deep in the mobile app dev space, I've seen how 'swivel chair' manual data entry kills productivity. But the shift from Generative AI to Agentic AI is changing that. Leaders like Salesforce and Anthropic are launching Enterprise Agents that navigate multi-step workflows from sourcing candidates to managing procurement. This isn't just theory; it's a structural reality. The companies that win in 2026 won't just have the biggest AI budgets; they will be the ones that redesigned their workflows for a non-human workforce today. Is your business ready to hire its first Enterprise Agent? Share your thoughts below. #AgenticAI #DigitalTransformation #EnterpriseAutomation #Productivity 2 Like Comment Share Copy LinkedIn Facebook X To view or add a comment, sign in More Relevant Posts Revival Group 6 followers 3w Repo

evidence.title: Sermicro Digital Group, Exclusive Partner of DRUID AI in Spain, is ...
evidence.snippet: # Sermicro Digital Group, Exclusive Partner of DRUID AI in Spain, is Enhancing Efficiency and Automation with Agentic AI for Employee and Customer-Facing Operations. Grupo Sermicro Digital, leader in digital services in Iberia and Latin America, and DRUID AI, a leading enterprise AI platform for creating, deploying, and orchestrating AI agents, have strengthened their strategic alliance. This partnership excels in maximizing the impact of AI agents and AI-driven solutions by combining DRUID AI's innovative platform with Sermicro Digital Group's expertise and management capabilities. Thanks to this alliance, DRUID AI and Sermicro Digital Group are positioned as **the benchmark in agentic AI solutions,** driving a new era in business digitalization**.**. DRUID AI (www.druidai.com) is an end-to-end, enterprise AI platform that enables lightning-fast development and deployment of AI Agents for teams looking to automate business processes and improve access to knowledgebases. Druid is an enterprise agentic AI orchestration platform enabling fast development and deployment of AI agents, knowledge bases, and intelligent applications that automate complex processes and increase technology ROI.

evidence.snippet:
Overview:
At Grupo Sermicro, we have been a leading company in the ICT sector for 40 years. We belong to the Cobra IS Group and have a multicultural team of more than 1,800 professionals. evidence.title: 10 Best Clodura Alternatives for B2B Prospecting in 2026 - Enginy
evidence.snippet: **Enginy AI** is a B2B prospecting automation platform that integrates company search, data enrichment from multiple sources, multichannel sequences (email and LinkedIn), centralized response management, and native CRM integration. **When to choose Hunter over Clodura?** If you only need to find specific emails, verify lists, and don't require calling, advanced sequences, or intent data. While Clodura charges 1 credit per email, 10 per phone, 200 per warmup session (which can rise quickly), Enginy consolidates data + enrichment + execution + AI in a single price without surprises by volume. If your team needs constant pipeline, quality data without depending on a single source, and reducing fragmented stack without sacrificing multichannel, **Enginy AI** may be the alternative you're looking for. Clodura tries to be all-in-one with credit model; alternatives like **Enginy AI** consolidate data + execution without charging per individual unlock, while ZoomInfo or Cognism focus only on premium data.
